uniformOmegaBranchTransportStatus.label: uniform omega branch transport
uniformOmegaBranchTransportStatus.reason: For |omega|<1/2, the branch factors exp(0.5 sigma omega(s+u)) are positive and locally uniformly bounded by exp(0.25(s+u)) on compact omega ranges.  Theta/Phi super-exponential decay controls the Volterra integrals, so the branch feature maps form the same closed graph domain for every |omega|<1/2.

omegaIndependentHardyMultiplierStatus.label: omega-independent Hardy multiplier contraction
omegaIndependentHardyMultiplierStatus.reason: The multiplier K(s,u)=(1-s-u)/(1+s+u) is independent of omega and satisfies |K|<=1 on the Volterra quadrant.  The closed Green-lift theorem therefore gives M_omega<=P_omega for every |omega|<1/2, with no parameter cover needed.

uniformPrimitiveEndpointCompatibilitySta.label: uniform primitive endpoint compatibility
uniformPrimitiveEndpointCompatibilitySta.reason: Primitive tests need not lie in ker R_global, but the primitive boundary repair is zero and the quotient repair D_q=(M-P)_+ vanishes.  Since M_omega<=P_omega uniformly, this compatibility holds for every |omega|<1/2.

originalWeylPositivityStatus.label: original Weyl kernel positivity for |omega|<1/2
originalWeylPositivityStatus.reason: The quotient-to-original lift is closed, the primitive endpoint correction is annihilated, and the plus/minus Volterra trace form is positive by the omega-independent Green-lift contraction. Thus the original coordinate Weyl kernel K_omega is positive semidefinite for every |omega|<1/2.

klmPositiveTypeStatus.label: KLM quantum positive-type condition for Q_omega
klmPositiveTypeStatus.reason: In the hbar=1 convention used throughout the notes, positivity of the Weyl quantization of sigma_omega is equivalent to the KLM quantum positive-type condition for Q_omega.  Therefore Q_omega is KLM positive type for every |omega|<1/2.

deBrangesRhBridgeStatus.label: de Branges/RH bridge
deBrangesRhBridgeStatus.reason: This theorem packages Weyl positivity as KLM positive type.  It does not prove that this KLM/Weyl positivity is equivalent to, or implies, the desired de Branges/RH-side statement.
deBrangesRhBridgeStatus.blocker: State and prove a separate bridge theorem from the KLM/Weyl positive-type family to the intended de Branges or RH-side positivity formulation.

proof: The branch factors are positive for real omega and uniformly integrable for |omega|<1/2 by theta/Phi decay.
The Hardy multiplier kappa=(1-s-u)/(1+s+u) is independent of omega and has absolute value at most one.
The completed Green-lift theorem gives G_- = C K E G_+ and ||C K E||<=1, hence M_omega<=P_omega.
Primitive endpoint compatibility gives D_bdy=0 and D_q=(M_omega-P_omega)_+=0.
The quotient-to-original Weyl lift transports this positivity back to K_omega.
The hbar=1 KLM/Weyl equivalence packages K_omega positivity as KLM positive type of Q_omega.
nextProofTarget: State and prove a separate bridge theorem from the KLM/Weyl positive-type family to the intended de Branges or RH-side positivity formulation.
